flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Whitman College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.0k → $64.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Whitman College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.0k → $64.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Whitman College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (81.0% vs 88.4%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Whitman College are 48% above 6-year earnings ($45.6k → $67.6k).
